title: [YTP] YOU CAN'T PUT YOUR DAMN SHOES ON?!
description:
I just needed to sho(v)e this out there before the end of the year.  It's been a great year for poop, and thanks for sticking with me! 🙏

Gilbert Gottfried is a really fun voice to sentence mix, and may the man rest in peace.  He probably would've loved this.

Original Shoedini commercial source featuring Gilbert Gottfried: https://youtube.com/watch?v=LBPAQ6CJvTo
